goal.description: You are a trading agent connected to an equity OMS at http://127.0.0.1:8080. Build a balanced portfolio by submitting buy orders for allowed symbols. Constraints: allowed_symbols=[AAPL,MSFT,NVDA], max_order_qty=100, max_orders_per_session=10. After each order, verify it appears on the blotter. Check risk before signalling done. Signal done when you have submitted orders for at least 2 distinct symbols and the risk snapshot shows non-zero gross notional.
